tools.name: venue_info
tools.title: Venue info
tools.description: Return general information about YUME Café · Lounge in Sousse, Tunisia: concept, opening hours, reservation link and the list of themed worlds.

tools.name: list_worlds
tools.title: List immersive worlds
tools.description: List every themed immersive world (LED universe) available at YUME Café · Lounge in Sousse, Tunisia. Returns slug, name, tagline and accent color for each world.

tools.name: get_world
tools.title: Get world details
tools.description: Return the full description of one immersive YUME world — its atmosphere, soundtrack and recommended food & drink pairing.

slug.description: World slug. One of: sakura, tokyo-neon, zen-forest, aquarium, kyoto, galaxy.

tools.name: search_menu
tools.title: Search the menu
tools.description: Search the YUME menu (drinks, sushi, desserts). Optionally filter by category or a free-text query matched against name and description. Prices are in Tunisian Dinar (DT).

category.description: Optional category filter. One of: Boissons chaudes, Bubble tea, Mocktails, Sushi & Maki, Desserts.
